questions.q: What provoked Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to nearly lose his composure during a recent podcast interview?
options: Being pressed on whether the U.S. should sell AI chips to China
A question regarding his signature leather jacket
Claims that Nvidia's new GPUs are overheating
Being asked about his retirement plans
questions.correctText: Being pressed on whether the U.S. should sell AI chips to China

questions.q: How was the location of the Dutch frigate HNLMS Evertsen inadvertently exposed for 24 hours?
options: A Bluetooth tracker hidden inside a postcard
A sailor's public fitness tracker data
A stealth drone tailing the ship from port
Unsecured Wi-Fi networks onboard
questions.correctText: A Bluetooth tracker hidden inside a postcard

questions.q: During the 2026 Beijing half-marathon, what unique group of competitors raced alongside human runners?
options: Dozens of humanoid robots
Genetically modified racing dogs
Autonomous self-driving scooters
Drone-assisted inline skaters

questions.q: The experimental drug elraglusib recently made headlines for doubling the one-year survival rate of patients with which condition?
options: Advanced pancreatic cancer
Early-stage Alzheimer's disease
Severe cystic fibrosis
Treatment-resistant leukemia

questions.q: Why did the US International Trade Commission recently decide not to reinstate an import ban on Apple Watches?
options: Apple's reworked blood-oxygen monitoring technology did not infringe on Masimo's patents
Apple paid a multi-billion dollar settlement to the US government
The watches were reclassified as essential medical devices
Apple moved all of its smartwatch manufacturing back to the United States
questions.correctText: Apple's reworked blood-oxygen monitoring technology did not infringe on Masimo's patents
